steps.title: Parallel lines → same slope
steps.content: Read slope of line $r$ directly from $4x - 3y = 8$: rearrange → $y = \frac{4}{3}x - \frac{8}{3}$, so slope $= \frac{4}{3}$.

steps.title: Apply parallel rule
steps.content: Line $s$ is parallel to line $r$, so it has the same slope: $\frac{4}{3}$. That matches choice D — D is correct.
